title: Fixing broken link for container-registries.conf
body: The link to the container-registries.conf man page was a little off - this fixes it.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

Thanks @kris-nova !  We just moved that recently and it looks like we missed a reference.

Our Test CI system is a bit cranky and won't take a commit unless it's signed.  Could you please do `git commit --amend -s` and repush the pr?  Thanks!

LGTM
Thanks @kris-nova, just fix the commit message and we will merge.
@kris-nova Thanks again for this PR and the blog, if you don't have time, I will just fix this PR and give you credit.  Will merge in a couple of days if we don't hear from you.
